projectDescription: LeadRev is a B2B Revenue Intelligence platform that helps sales teams detect overdue leads, recover stalled deals, and eliminate revenue leakage from imported pipeline data.
keyFeatures: Lead import via CSV, CRM sync, or API
Automated detection of overdue, untouched, and no-next-step leads
Recovery Queue: prioritized list of at-risk leads requiring action
Lead health and risk scoring with configurable thresholds
Contact log: record calls, emails, and meetings directly on leads
Revenue leakage dashboard showing pipeline at risk
Pipeline health overview with deal stage analytics
Configurable risk rules and notification alerts
publicApiSurface: GET /api/leads — list leads with filters (status, risk, stage)
GET /api/leads/{id} — get a single lead with health/risk data
PATCH /api/leads/{id} — update lead status or metadata
POST /api/contacts — log a contact activity on a lead
GET /api/contacts — list contact history for a lead
GET /api/tasks — list tasks (by lead, assignee, due date)
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} — update or complete a task
GET /api/pipeline — get pipeline summary and leakage metrics
GET /api/pipeline/at-risk — list leads contributing to revenue leakage
